data.body:
S5 STATUS + BLOCKER (session 3). PROVEN LIVE so far: scenario 1 (parallel siblings 251/252, merge-if-necessary no-rebase), scenario 2 (delta-only review, change 248), scenario 3 (merge-back 254 -> MERGED 08194e1a9, GitHub main advanced, /MERGE_LIST-only review = zero re-review), scenario 4 (cited S3 AC4 change 234 vote-carry), scenario 7 (ACL negatives: non-member branch-create 403 + merge-push 'not allowed to upload merges'; positive contrast change 254). Committed driver: infra/gerrit/feature-branch-e2e.sh + feature-branch-e2e-scenarios.sh. Evidence in docs/88ab-feature-branch-evidence.md.

BLOCKER (filed as bug pelt-mead-aeon, discovered_from this epic): the rebar REVIEW BOT is broken system-wide since the ~01:38Z auto-deploy of main@151c2b69 (rebar.llm refactor 1fb66466d). It casts NO LLM-Review on any change (256+ all stuck, all agents), failing internally with 'cannot list /tmp/reviewbot-<x>/.tickets-tracker'. Container serves /health 200 so ADR-0026 auto-rollback didn't fire. This blocks scenario 6 (caller change 257 got Verified+1 but no LLM-Review) and blocks landing S5/S6 deliverables (both need LLM-Review). Left artifact: throwaway src/rebar/_e2e_s6_base.py landed on main (change 255) — scenario 6 aborted before its delete step; will clean up. Root-cause investigation + remediation decision pending.
